_observed: Production case 2026-05-25 — the wishlist alert email that triggered Task #17. eBay search for 'Venusaur ex 151' returned a $1.75 'NEAR MINT' listing that was actually a keyword-stuffed sleeve / accessory. The title matches every search keyword, the condition string reads 'NEAR MINT', but $1.75 vs $40-80 real market makes the listing junk. Stage 1 (outlier rejection) is the gate that catches this — $1.75 falls well below 30% of any credible-listing median.
title: Venusaur ex 151 NEAR MINT Pokemon Card Sleeve Holo Foil Collectible Mint Holder
